videos.headline: Highlight: Jackson Arnold flies Auburn to win over Baylor
videos.description: Arnold runs for 137 yards and two TDs, with Damari Alston and Jeremiah Cobb adding scores to lift the Tigers to a 38-24 season-opening win over the Bears.
